title: Expression
description: The generalized Digi Lady schema. The outermost saucer-layer of any artifact in the Bone & Saucer / SVL. Describes how a thing presents itself, not what it is. Works for characters, temples, cities, corporations, blockchains, flowers, decks, modules.

portrait.description: The face the artifact shows the world. A name, a silhouette, an opening line.

faction.description: What family, school, lineage, or alignment this artifact claims.

status.description: Its current lifecycle stance: Nascent, Ancient, Sealed, Drifting, Fallow, Awakened, etc. Free text; no enum, by design.

humor.description: Its temperament — one line that captures how it speaks when no one is asking.

bound_to.description: Optional binding back up the spine: which Role this expression chiefly serves, and under which Grammar it was rendered.

reliqery.description: Reserved-empty slots for this expression: facets the artist knows are coming but has not yet voiced.
